history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young person with dark, curly hair sits on a wooden chair, facing away from the camera and towards the left side of the frame. They are wearing a black t-shirt with a graphic print and loose white pants. Their right hand is raised, touching their face, and they wear a ring on their left hand and a bracelet on their right wrist. The background features a plain, light-colored wall with an electrical outlet and cord on the left. To the right, a partition made of vertical wooden slats with glass panels separates the space. In the foreground, on a rustic wooden table, are two clear plastic cups with drinks and a small orange bowl containing food, possibly noodles or salad. The lighting is dim and atmospheric, casting soft shadows and creating a slightly moody, introspective feel. The color palette is dominated by muted tones of beige, brown, black, and white, with a pop of color from the orange bowl. The overall style is casual and contemporary, with a hint of urban or cafe ambiance.
